Full description: From a single object to a large-scale landscape - this library covers everything. Organic scenes captured from real environments, synthetic scenes built for precision, indoor spaces with fine detail, outdoor locations at full scale. Each scene is a window into what your space, asset, or environment could look like as a digital twin.
Short description: 3DGS scene library covering the full range of environments we work with.

Full description:
1.9 billion Muslims worldwide - only 20 million reach Mecca each year. Hajj Virtual Tour closes that gap with photorealistic 3DGS reconstructions of the holy sites, accessible in any browser, on any smartphone.
An AI guide responds in any language with theological accuracy. Users don't just watch, they explore, ask, and understand. No headset. No hardware. Just the experience.
Short description: An AI-powered immersive knowledge hub that brings the sacred sites of Hajj & Umrah to any device, in any language.

Full description:
A 3D digital twin of an Epiroc drilling rig built on Datum Teller - with an AI assistant trained on real technical documentation, accessible on any device.
Three scenarios: a sales tour for decision-makers (key advantages in minutes, no equipment on-site required), a training tour where the AI assistant guides operators step by step, and on-site support - operators troubleshoot directly on the 3D model.
Short description: 3D digital twin of an Epiroc drilling rig with an AI assistant that sells, trains, and supports complex equipment without it being in the room.

Full description:
Construction deviations caught too late cost money. Recon fixes that — Axion dashboards combined with Datum Teller 3D reconstruction, everything in one window.
See inspection analytics across all sites, spot bottlenecks instantly, and let AI surface the issues before they escalate. One click takes you from a city-scale insight to a specific building, stage, or inspection.
From the dashboard, step into a 3D reconstruction of the site at any point in time — or jump into drone video and 360° panoramas to verify what actually happened.
Short description: Platform that brings full construction oversight into one window — AI-powered dashboards, inspection analytics, and 3D site reconstruction across every stage of the build.

Full description:
Large 3D scenes are heavy. Loading them fully upfront kills performance, especially on mobile. LOD streaming solves this by loading only what the viewer needs, at the right level of detail, at the right moment.
For 3DGS scenes specifically, this is critical — Gaussian Splat environments are dense by nature, with millions of data points per scene. Without intelligent streaming, large-scale splat scenes simply don't run on everyday devices.
This demo is built on Datum SDK and shows the technology in action — smooth navigation through large-scale 3DGS environments, without lag, without compromise. The foundation that makes Datum Teller work at scale.
Short description: LOD streaming demo built on Datum SDK. Large scenes, loaded intelligently.

Full description:
Museums struggle to engage children. Passive tours are forgotten the moment kids walk out the door - no sharing, no return visits, no buzz.
This demo turns the real museum into a game - launched via QR code directly in the smartphone browser, no downloads, no hardware. Children explore alongside an AI avatar guide, pull artifacts out from behind the glass, examine them in 3D, discover their real historical context, and answer mini-quizzes along the way.
More school visits. Higher family attendance. Experiences children share on social media. A museum that stays with them long after they leave.
Short description: A 3D quest for children that turns a museum visit into an adventure -  launched via QR code, no app required.

Full description:
Most people experience Hajj as a spiritual journey. Few see the system behind it — how millions are allocated access, how flows are managed, and how planning shapes every step.
This Méridien long-read makes that system visible. Narrative-led, data-backed, built with maps, charts, and spatial models. Each section answers one clear question through evidence, not opinion.
Industries: Culture & Heritage, Education, Government, Municipalities, Tourism
Short description: A narrative-led data feature on the Hajj and Umrah

Full description:
SCE Brain is Axion applied to professional compliance — an agentic AI platform that doesn't just report problems, it anticipates them.
A self-improving fleet of AI agents organized around SCE's own SPAR framework continuously monitors, flags, and acts — every interaction makes the system smarter. An AI co-pilot composes dashboards, formulates insights, and drafts executive reports, turning data exploration into a conversation.
Analytics render on any device through client-side GPU — mobile, workstation, or control room video wall. On-premises ready. Accountable by design — every consequential decision is reviewable, overridable, and audit-ready.
Short description: The Agentic Decision Intelligence platform for proactive professional compliance in KSA's engineering sector.
